channel.title: drm on Layle's Lair
channel.description: Recent content in drm on Layle's Lair

item.title: A Story about a Russian DRM and Lego Rock Raiders
item.description: I was approached by “The Research Realm” - a collective aiming to preserve Lego’s history - to create a No-CD crack and fix for a rare version of Lego Rock Raiders.
